description: Multiple PHP remote file inclusion vulnerabilities in openMairie openPlanning 1.00, when register_globals is enabled, allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary PHP code via a URL in the path_om parameter to (1) categorie.class.php, (2) profil.class.php, (3) collectivite.class.php, (4) ressource.class.php, (5) droit.class.php, (6) utilisateur.class.php, and (7) planning.class.php in obj/.
